glosses.ja: レンガ; 牛乳パック

sentences.target: Tu poses la brique là, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty poz la bʁik la sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu poses la brique là, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty poz la bʁik la sil tə plɛ/
translations.es: Pon el ladrillo ahí, por favor.
translations.it: Metti il mattone lì, per favore.
translations.yue: 麻煩你將塊磚擺喺嗰度。
translations.pt: Coloca o tijolo ali, por favor.
translations.vi: Vui lòng đặt viên gạch ở đó.
translations.nb: Legg mursteinen der, vær så snill.
translations.id: Tolong taruh batu bata itu di sana.
translations.ja: そのレンガをそこに置いてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb 'poses'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'brique'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'poses'.
Deictic adverb indicating location; locative complement of 'poses'.
Contraction of 'si' (subordinating conjunction ‘if’) + 'il' (3rd person pronoun); part of the polite formula 's'il te plaît'.
Clitic indirect-object pronoun (2nd person singular); complement of 'plaît'.
3rd-person singular present; in the expression literally ‘(it) pleases (you)’. Subject is the implicit 'il' from 's'il'.

sentences.target: Je cherche une brique pour caler la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn bʁik puʁ kale la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je cherche une brique pour caler la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn bʁik puʁ kale la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I'm looking for a brick to wedge the door.
translations.es: Busco un ladrillo para calzar la puerta.
translations.de: Ich suche einen Ziegelstein, um die Tür zu verkeilen.
translations.it: Sto cercando un mattone per bloccare la porta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一块砖来把门卡住。
translations.yue: 我搵緊一塊磚嚟頂住個門。
translations.ru: Я ищу кирпич, чтобы подпереть дверь.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um tijolo para travar a porta.
translations.he: אני מחפש לבנה כדי לתמוך בדלת.
translations.tr: Kapıyı sıkıştırmak için bir tuğla arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một viên gạch để chèn cửa.
translations.ar: أبحث عن طوبة لأسند بها الباب.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een baksteen om de deur te stutten.
translations.uk: Я шукаю цеглу, щоб підперти двері.
translations.hu: Téglát keresek, hogy kitámasszam az ajtót.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़ा अटकाने के लिए एक ईंट ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα τούβλο για να σφηνώσω την πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en murstein for å kile døren.
translations.id: Saya mencari batu bata untuk menyangga pintu.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en tegelsten för att kila fast dörren.
translations.ro: Caut o cărămidă ca să înțepenesc ușa.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en mursten til at kile døren fast.
translations.fi: Etsin tiiltä, jolla voin kiilata oven.
translations.ja: ドアを固定するためにレンガを探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'cherche'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'brique'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition expressing purpose; introduces the infinitive 'caler'.
Infinitive verb; purpose complement governed by 'pour'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'porte'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'caler'.

sentences.target: Elle prend une brique de lait au frigo.
sentences.reading: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ yn bʁik də lɛ o fʁigo/

translations.fr: Elle prend une brique de lait au frigo.
translations.ipa: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ yn bʁik də lɛ o fʁigo/
translations.en: She takes a milk carton from the fridge.
translations.es: Ella saca un cartón de leche del refrigerador.
translations.de: Sie nimmt einen Milchkarton aus dem Kühlschrank.
translations.it: Lei prende una confezione di latte dal frigorifero.
translations.zh-Hans: 她从冰箱里拿出一盒牛奶。
translations.yue: 佢喺雪櫃拎出一盒牛奶。
translations.ru: Она достаёт из холодильника пакет молока.
translations.pt: Ela tira um pacote de leite da geladeira.
translations.tr: O, buzdolabından bir süt kutusu alıyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy lấy một hộp sữa từ tủ lạnh.
translations.ar: هي تأخذ عبوة حليب من الثلاجة.
translations.nl: Ze pakt een pak melk uit de koelkast.
translations.uk: Вона дістає з холодильника пачку молока.
translations.hu: Elővesz egy doboz tejet a hűtőből.
translations.hi: वह फ्रिज से दूध का डिब्बा निकालती है.
translations.pl: Ona wyjmuje z lodówki karton mleka.
translations.el: Αυτή βγάζει από το ψυγείο ένα κουτί γάλακτος.
translations.nb: Hun tar en melkekartong ut av kjøleskapet.
translations.id: Dia mengambil sebuah kotak susu dari kulkas.
translations.sv: Hon tar ut en mjölkkartong ur kylskåpet.
translations.ro: Ea scoate din frigider un carton de lapte.
translations.da: Hun tager en mælkekarton ud af køleskabet.
translations.ja: 彼女は冷蔵庫から牛乳パックを取り出す。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular feminine subject pronoun; subject of 'prend'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular.
Common feminine noun; head of the partitive/container phrase 'brique de lait' (here, a carton of milk).
Preposition linking 'brique' to its complement 'lait'.
Common masculine noun; complement of the preposition 'de'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; marks location.
Common masculine noun; object of the contracted preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: On empile chaque brique sur la palette.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃pil ʃak bʁik syʁ la palɛt/

translations.fr: On empile chaque brique sur la palette.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃pil ʃak bʁik syʁ la palɛt/
translations.en: We stack each brick on the pallet.
translations.es: Apilamos cada ladrillo sobre el palé.
translations.de: Wir stapeln jeden Ziegelstein auf die Palette.
translations.ko: 우리는 각 벽돌을 팔레트 위에 쌓습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把每块砖堆放在托盘上。
translations.yue: 我哋將每塊磚疊喺托盤上面。
translations.ru: Мы складываем каждый кирпич на поддон.
translations.he: אנחנו מערימים כל לבנה על המשטח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi xếp từng viên gạch lên pallet.
translations.ar: نكدّس كل طوبة على منصة التحميل.
translations.nl: We stapelen elke baksteen op de pallet.
translations.uk: Ми складаємо кожну цеглу на піддон.
translations.hi: हम हर ईंट को पैलेट पर रखते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi stabler hver murstein på pallen.
translations.id: Kami menumpuk setiap batu bata di palet.
translations.sv: Vi staplar varje tegelsten på pallen.
translations.da: Vi stabler hver mursten på pallen.
translations.ja: 私たちは一つ一つのレンガをパレットに積み重ねます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Distributive determiner modifying 'brique'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'empile'.
Preposition indicating location; introduces 'la palette'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'palette'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
